goal: G005 second adapter and operational completion
source: Approved plan §12 acceptance criteria and protocol criteria

statusDefinitions.automated: Repository test or static evidence exists; execution result must be attached by the release owner.
statusDefinitions.manual: Requires an operator, real runtime, device, or external service evidence.
statusDefinitions.deferred: No qualifying evidence exists; this is not a pass.
statusDefinitions.outOfScope: Explicitly excluded from this G005 task and not a pass.

gates.reason: Per assignment, Phase 0 gates are skipped; docs/runbooks/phase0-gates.md remains the gate authority.

criteria.criterion: Android Chrome access through Cloudflare Access login
Unified session list uses status-priority ordering
Prompt and real-time response work
criteria.evidence: Run focused adapter/hub integration test and Android browser session.

criteria.criterion: Pending action can be answered
Tunnel interruption and recovery catch up
criteria.evidence: docs/runbooks/operations.md incident recovery; external Tunnel exercise required

criteria.criterion: State survives restart and crash-consistency four-point matrix
Local idempotency
criteria.evidence: packages/core/src/database.test.ts and apps/hub/src/server.test.ts command duplicate coverage

criteria.criterion: Remote idempotency or unknown isolation per ADR-013
criteria.evidence: Runtime capability evidence for both adapters is required.

criteria.criterion: Pending actions return stale/idempotent terminal responses
Agent ports are private
criteria.evidence: docs/runbooks/operations.md and cloudflare-access.md read-only listener checks

criteria.criterion: Origin rejects three loopback invalid-JWT cases with 401/403
CSRF defense
criteria.evidence: No dedicated CSRF execution evidence supplied.

criteria.criterion: Credentials are not exposed
criteria.evidence: Runbook secret-handling requirements and release secret scan

criteria.criterion: Audit logs are secret-free
Artifact path traversal is rejected
100-session list does not load messages
Large tool output is separated as an artifact
criteria.evidence: No qualifying size/output test artifact supplied.

criteria.criterion: ADR-014 selected boot model has reboot proof
External uptime detects failure within five minutes
Degrade mode displays stale/unknown and rejects mutation
SQLite online backup and isolated restore
criteria.evidence: docs/runbooks/backup-restore.md online backup and drill procedure

criteria.criterion: No registration-to-publish gap
Exactly one senderTask per connection, static and runtime proof
criteria.evidence: Active-sender alert documented; runtime proof required.

criteria.criterion: Gate transitions CLOSED to OPEN exactly once with no reversal
CLOSED-period publish is sent after OPEN
criteria.evidence: Requires repeated replay/live boundary test evidence.

criteria.criterion: Replay/live wire order is ascending sequence
Disconnect wins in either gate state and sender is never recreated
Single-flight sends, immediate failed-send cleanup, no retry, overflow converges
publishMutex has no network I/O
criteria.evidence: Requires static lock-boundary check and metrics evidence.

criteria.criterion: Expired cursor returns 410/reset, heartbeat is liveness-only, Bridge HTTPS unused
criteria.evidence: apps/hub/src/server.test.ts cursor behavior; docs/runbooks/operations.md and cloudflare-access.md operational policy

criteria.criterion: Unsupported remote idempotency or ambiguous timeout becomes unknown without retry
